semantic.role: Defines the continuous integration (CI) pipeline for the ArchSpine project, automating verification, testing, documentation building, and release readiness checks.
responsibilities: Automated testing and validation on push/PR to main/master branches
Package smoke testing for npm publish readiness

English.purpose: This document defines the CI workflow for the ArchSpine project. It ensures that every push or pull request to the main or master branches triggers automated verification steps, including building, unit testing, protocol asset validation, release gate checks, documentation builds, and package smoke tests. The goal is to maintain code quality and release readiness across multiple Node.js versions.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers and maintainers of the ArchSpine project who need to understand the automated checks that run in the CI pipeline. It is also relevant for DevOps engineers managing the repository's continuous integration setup.
key_takeaways: CI runs on push/PR to main/master and can be triggered manually.
Verification includes build, unit tests, protocol validation, release gate, docs build, and package smoke check.
Node.js versions 20 and 22 are tested in parallel.
The release gate and package smoke check ensure npm publish readiness.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 项目的持续集成（CI）工作流程。它确保每次向 main 或 master 分支的推送或拉取请求都会触发自动验证步骤，包括构建、单元测试、协议资产验证、发布门控检查、文档构建和包冒烟测试。其目标是在多个 Node.js 版本上维护代码质量和发布就绪状态。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向 ArchSpine 项目的开发者和维护者，帮助他们了解 CI 管道中运行的自动化检查。同时，也适用于管理仓库持续集成设置的 DevOps 工程师。
key_takeaways: CI 在推送到 main/master 或发起拉取请求时运行，也可手动触发。
验证步骤包括构建、单元测试、协议验证、发布门控、文档构建和包冒烟检查。
并行测试 Node.js 20 和 22 两个版本。
发布门控和包冒烟检查确保 npm 发布就绪。
